history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would lead to lava at 02C. To reach the goal, I need to go down and then right. I should first turn to face down. Turning right (clockwise) changes my orientation from right to down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front of me (B03) is a floor (`.`), which is safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at D04, as I can then navigate right and down through safe cells. Therefore, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down (`v`). My goal is at row 04, column D. Directly below me is safe floor, but to reach the goal I need to avoid the lava at (04,C). I can instead move east along row 03 to column D, then go down to the goal. Since I am facing down, I need to turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B, facing right. The cell directly in front of me is row 03 column C, which is a floor cell (`.`). I can safely move forward to get closer to the goal at row 04 column D. After that, I will need to move forward again to row 03 column D, then turn right to face down and move forward to the goal. So my immediate action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell C03 facing right. Moving forward leads to D03, which is a safe floor cell. From there, I can turn right to face down and then move forward to reach the goal at D04. Moving forward now is safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing right. The goal is directly below me at row 04, column D. I cannot move forward because column E is a wall. To face down, I need to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down (`v`). The goal is directly in front of me at row 04, column D. Moving forward will reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
